app.title: Nekode
app.tagline: Your team's collaboration and AI agent control plane.

sidebar.noChannelsYet: No channels yet. Create one to get started.
sidebar.noAgentsYet: No agents provisioned. Enroll a daemon to register one.
sidebar.noMachinesYet: No machines enrolled. Install the daemon on a host to see it here.

noChannelSelected.title: No channel selected
noChannelSelected.messagesBody: You haven't joined any channels yet. Create a channel from the sidebar, or pick a direct message to start a conversation.
noChannelSelected.tasksBody: Tasks belong to a channel. Create a channel from the sidebar first, then come back here to open a board.
noChannelSelected.remindersBody: Reminders are scheduled inside a channel. Create a channel from the sidebar to start scheduling them.

auth.setupSubtitle: Choose the first administrator. You can add more users later.
